category_sources: source_facts.description says Envoy is a cloud-native high-performance edge/middle/service proxy; official Envoy docs describe Envoy proxy documentation.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is envoy; official site and repository brand it as Envoy.
docs_sources: Official Envoy documentation index at envoyproxy.io/docs lists stable Envoy docs.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/envoyproxy/envoy; per instructions repo was not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a cloud-native service proxy; official Envoy docs describe Envoy as an L7 proxy and communication bus.
